settings.heading: Marketplace participation and partner offer terms
settings.text: Review the general terms that apply to Remote Business Partner marketplace pathways, partner offers and external provider routes.

settings.heading: What marketplace users should understand
settings.text: Marketplace pathways can involve external providers, partner criteria, availability conditions and separate terms.

settings.title: Partner eligibility
settings.text: Partner offers may require business eligibility, location, customer status, commercial assessment or other conditions before access is available.

settings.title: External provider terms
settings.text: External providers may apply their own terms, pricing, acceptance criteria, privacy settings, contracts, policy wording or service conditions.

settings.title: Availability conditions
settings.text: Marketplace pathways can change or become unavailable based on partner participation, stock, capacity, provider requirements, location or timing.

settings.title: No approval guarantee
settings.text: RBP does not guarantee partner approval, offer eligibility, quote availability, funding approval, insurance coverage, NBN serviceability or marketplace offer availability.

settings.title: Advice boundary
settings.text: Marketplace content is general information and does not replace legal, financial, insurance, accounting, tax or other regulated professional advice.

settings.title: Need clarification
settings.text: Contact RBP before using a marketplace pathway if the provider, offer conditions or next step is unclear.

settings.heading: Return to marketplace pathways
settings.text: Use marketplace pages only where the pathway is active, public and suitable for your business context.
